title: 12D/10N Holyland Experience – Egypt, Israel & Jordan 2026
details: Embark on a once-in-a-lifetime spiritual journey through Egypt, Israel, and Jordan. This all-in Holyland pilgrimage includes renewal of vows, baptism at the Jordan River, visits to iconic biblical and historical sites, full-board meals, guided sightseeing, and a Filipino tour leader.

itinerary.day_details: Meet the group at NAIA Terminal 1 for airline check-in and boarding. Enjoy inflight amenities. Arrival at Cairo International Airport, meet and greet with tour guide and driver. Transfer to hotel for check-in. Dinner and overnight in Cairo.

itinerary.day_title: Day 02: Cairo – Giza Pyramids & Old Cairo (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner)
itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, visit the iconic Giza Pyramids and the Great Sphinx. After lunch, explore the Egyptian Museum, followed by visits to a Papyrus and Perfume Shop. Continue to Old Cairo including the Hanging Church and Ben Ezra Synagogue. In the evening, enjoy an open buffet dinner with a belly dance show aboard a Nile Cruise. Overnight in Cairo.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/12D/10N Holyland Experience – Egypt, Israel & Jordan 2026/Day2_1769571939.png

itinerary.day_details: Early departure from Cairo to Dahab. Visit St. Catherine’s Monastery, one of the world’s oldest Christian monasteries, located at the foot of Mount Sinai where Moses received the Ten Commandments. After the visit, proceed to hotel for dinner and overnight.
Cross the Taba Border into Israel and enjoy a scenic drive through Eilat along the Red Sea. Stop for lunch en route. Continue north to Bethlehem for hotel check-in, dinner, and overnight.

itinerary.day_title: Day 05: Bethlehem – Nativity Church – Mount of Olives (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner)
itinerary.day_details: Visit the Church of the Nativity, St. Catherine’s Church, Milk Grotto, and Shepherd’s Field. Continue to the Mount of Olives for panoramic views of Jerusalem. Visit the Church of the Ascension, Pater Noster Church, walk the Palm Sunday Road to Dominus Flevit, then visit the Garden of Gethsemane and the Church of All Nations. Dinner and overnight in Bethlehem.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/12D/10N Holyland Experience – Egypt, Israel & Jordan 2026/Day5_1769571963.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 06: Jerusalem Old City – Dead Sea (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner)
itinerary.day_details: Explore Jerusalem’s Old City beginning at St. Anne’s Church and the Pool of Bethesda. Walk the Via Dolorosa to the Church of the Holy Sepulchre. Visit the Western Wall, continue to Jericho and see the Sycamore Tree. Visit Qumran and experience floating at the Dead Sea. Dinner and overnight in Bethlehem.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/12D/10N Holyland Experience – Egypt, Israel & Jordan 2026/Day6_1769571977.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 07: Mt. Zion – Caesarea – Haifa – Cana – Nazareth (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner)
itinerary.day_details: Visit Mount Zion including the Room of the Last Supper and St. Peter in Gallicantu. Drive to Caesarea Maritima to see the Roman Aqueduct. Continue to Haifa to visit the Basilica of Mount Carmel and view the Bahá’i Gardens. Proceed to Cana for renewal of wedding vows. Dinner and overnight in Nazareth or Tiberias.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/12D/10N Holyland Experience – Egypt, Israel & Jordan 2026/Day7_1769571982.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 08: Jordan River – Sea of Galilee – Churches (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner)
itinerary.day_details: Visit Yardenit on the Jordan River for baptismal renewal. Continue to Mount Tabor, Capernaum, Tabgha, the Church of the Primacy of St. Peter, and the Mount of Beatitudes. Enjoy a scenic boat ride on the Sea of Galilee. Dinner and overnight.
Visit the Church of the Annunciation and Joseph’s Workshop. Enjoy a final boat ride in Galilee. Cross the Sheikh Hussein Bridge into Jordan. Dinner and overnight in Amman.
Travel to the ancient city of Petra. Enter through the Siq and walk to the Treasury. Explore the rose-red city carved from stone over 2,000 years ago. Return to Amman for dinner and overnight.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/12D/10N Holyland Experience – Egypt, Israel & Jordan 2026/Day10_1769571992.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 11: Amman – Mount Nebo – Madaba – Departure (Breakfast/Lunch)
itinerary.day_details: Visit Madaba and St. George’s Church, home of the Mosaic Map of the Holy Land. Continue to Mount Nebo, where Moses viewed the Promised Land. Transfer to Amman Airport for departure back to Manila.
Arrival in Manila. Home sweet home.

inclusions: Roundtrip economy airfare via Oman Air
10 nights hotel accommodation in 4-star hotels (twin/triple sharing)
Meals as indicated in the itinerary
Private coach transfers during the tour
Sightseeing tours and entrance fees as per itinerary
Boat ride on the Sea of Galilee
Unlimited bottled water on the bus
One refreshing juice drink per day
Baptismal robe during Jordan River baptism
Free travel insurance up to age 70 (2.5M coverage)
extra_details: Initial downpayment: $300 per person to reserve slot
Second downpayment: $300 per person after one month
Full payment required 45 days before travel period
